ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product line associated with the size chart */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group the size chart is intended for (e.g., Toddler, Child, Teen) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the size chart is intended for (e.g., Male, Female, Unisex) */,
  "chart_version" TEXT /* Version number of the size chart */,
  "chart_description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the size chart */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the size chart was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the size chart was last updated */,
  "target_age_range_min" INTEGER /* Minimum age of the target age range */,
  "target_age_range_max" INTEGER /* Maximum age of the target age range */,
  "recommended_fit" TEXT /* Description of the recommended fit */,
  "regional_variation" INTEGER /* Indicates if the chart has regional variations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_product_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_line_id") REFERENCES product_lines ("product_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_lines" (
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product line */,
  "product_line_name" TEXT /* Name of the product line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product line */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product line */,
  "target_gender" TEXT /* Target gender for the product line */,
  "target_age_group" TEXT /* Target age group for the product line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_chart_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size detail */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart the detail belongs to */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size designation (e.g., 2, 4, 6) */,
  "stature_cm" TEXT /* Stature (height) in centimeters */,
  "chest_cm" TEXT /* Chest measurement in centimeters */,
  "waist_cm" TEXT /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "stature_in" TEXT /* Stature (height) in inches */,
  "chest_in" TEXT /* Chest measurement in inches */,
  "waist_in" TEXT /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "shoulder_width_cm" TEXT /* Shoulder width measurement in centimeters */,
  "shoulder_width_in" TEXT /* Shoulder width measurement in inches */,
  "hip_cm" TEXT /* Hip measurement in centimeters */,
  "hip_in" TEXT /* Hip measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length_cm" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement in centimeters */,
  "sleeve_length_in" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  "neck_cm" TEXT /* Neck measurement in centimeters */,
  "neck_in" TEXT /* Neck measurement in inches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_details_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_chart_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the size chart */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the version was last updated */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "approved_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the version was approved */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_versions_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_versions_approved_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_versions_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_chart_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart the note belongs to */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the note */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_notes_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_notes_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, product manager, QA) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the size chart */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the size chart was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the size chart */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product line */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart */,
  "association_date" TEXT /* Date when the association was created */,
  "association_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_associations_product_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_line_id") REFERENCES product_lines ("product_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_associations_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_chart_regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart the region belongs to */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_notes" TEXT /* Notes or adjustments for the region */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the regional variation */,
  "approved_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the regional variation */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the regional variation was approved */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the regional variation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_regions_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_regions_approved_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_regions_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id")
)
